creator: taguchi@tohoku.iij.ad.jp
text:
This patch is for MD5 fix x11/XttXF86srv-common.

Fix: Please apply following patch.
I've tested this ports, make all package deinstall reinstall.

PS: Thank you for your alert, Asami-san.
